notes: Wayback Machine snapshots of pre-SPA taptools.io ranking grids, CDX-enumerated and per-snapshot mirrored with chain-of-custody. rankings/charts/ holds the historical token ranking time series (5 content-bearing snapshots 2022-05..2022-10 carry server-rendered top-N ranked lists + featured-token metadata; later snapshots document the SPA conversion). _inventory/cdx-charts-all.jsonl is the historical-project-metadata index of all archived /charts/* URLs. Per-asset chart pages are indexed but not mirrored (scope: not trader tooling).
